cases.prompt: 구독 관리 서비스 뭐 쓰지? RevenueCat vs Stripe Billing 비교해줘

assertions.text: Compares subscription management services (RevenueCat/Stripe Billing/Chargebee/Paddle/Lemon Squeezy).
Recommends a service based on platform (mobile vs web) and scale via the decision tree.

cases.prompt: Which subscription billing platform should I use for a web SaaS?

assertions.text: Uses the platform decision tree to pick (e.g., Stripe Billing for web SaaS, RevenueCat for mobile IAP).
Provides an integration guide for the selected service.
